programme.desc: A woman is planning the town's Christmas celebration and must win over a firefighter in order to obtain his beautiful spruce for the tree lighting.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas by Starlight

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Promise

programme.desc: A resort developer heads to Christmas, Colorado, to scope out a new piece of land. While away, she has a minor car accident and meets the towns handsome sheriff, who helps her have a Christmas to remember.

programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: A recently single travel writer is forced to share a cabin due to a mix up on her holiday vacation. What is an annoyance at first quickly changes to a new romance.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Sleigh Bells Ring

programme.title: The Office: Did I Stutter?

programme.title: The Office: Job Fair
programme.desc: Jim tries to land his biggest client ever with Andy and Kevin's help. Meanwhile, Michael sets up a booth at a local job fair being held at Pam's alma mater, to find the best and brightest for Dunder-Mifflin's summer internship.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Asbestos Fest

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Girls' Night
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla have a girls' night out and Patrick teaches David about compromise.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: RIP Moira Rose
programme.desc: A rumor of Moira's death appears online and Roland asks Johnny to be his child's godfather.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Open Mic

programme.title: Kevin Hart: Laugh at My Pain
programme.desc: Joking about his bank account to his 'safe word,' Kevin teaches us that, regardless of what's going on in life, to always take time to laugh.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey the Christmas Poo
programme.desc: The kids are practicing their Christmas play when they find out that Kyle doesn't celebrate Christmas. Kyle explains that he celebrates the visit of 'Mr. Hankey, the Christmas Poo' but no one believes him and he is eventually sent to a mental institution.

programme.title: South Park: A Very Crappy Christmas
programme.desc: When Mr. Hankey skips Christmas, the boys go searching for him in the sewer, where they find him living with his alcoholic wife and their three little nuggets. They decide to make a video Christmas card to save the spirit of the season.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics
programme.desc: Mr. Hankey introduces 10 musical segments highlighting songs on the 'Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics' CD. The boys and all of the other South Park characters sing their own songs for the holidays and realize that Christmas is all about the presents.

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Tabora Family - Part 2
programme.desc: The Tabora family's makeover is in full swing--you won't want to miss what the team has in store for this Marine Corps family.

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Wishes for Christmas
programme.desc: When a mysterious lady grants a woman 12 wishes at Christmas and they magically come true, she must work to set things right after the fallout.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Daughter of the Bride
programme.desc: A young wedding planner who disapproves of her mother's whirlwind romance tries to stop their upcoming holiday nuptials. However, something unexpected happens that forces her to re-examine the relationship and learn to let go of her old feelings.

programme.title: Movie: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman discovers a letter from a little girl asking Santa to send her daddy a new wife for Christmas. The young woman decides to seek them out, hoping to make herself their gift from Santa.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Reservations
programme.desc: When a woman's college sweetheart re-enters her life unexpectedly over Christmas, she begins thinking about her life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sled Dog Breeder
programme.desc: Mike finds out what it takes to breed sled dogs at the Happy Trails Kennel in Alaska.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wine Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the Napa Valley and gets extremely dirty as he takes on the unappealing job of making wine. Mike then rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty at a Kansas Cattle Ranch where he gets a lesson on how dirty the cattle business can be.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: A team of workers round up a flock of wild geese in the tundra, with airplanes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Inseminator
programme.desc: Mike crawls through rat drops, falling insulation and debris to make a house more energy efficient and he visits a turkey farm where he gets to suck semen out of a bunch of large-breasted birds.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Gourd Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the middle of Connecticut to clean out a lake, and then drops by a gourd farm in Pennsylvania and transforms gourds into a variety of products.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cranberry Farmer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty making hand made bricks in South Carolina and then masters the art of cranberry farming in Oregon.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Goose Down Plucker
programme.desc: Mike heads to Meridian, California to find out what it takes to harvest walnuts. Then he spends some time in Tulelake where he learns how to make goose down pillows and comforters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Worm Grunter
programme.desc: Mike heads out to Florida to harvest some clams and then takes on some worm grunting in the Apalachicola National Forest.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Chicken Busters
programme.desc: Mike spends the day working with the Chicken Busters, chasing and catching feral chickens. Then he answers a fan letter about the familial bond often rooted within the jobs he works.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Medical Waste
programme.desc: Mike travels to Sioux Falls and South Dakota to spend the day working as a medical waste processor.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Doomsday Seed Banker
programme.desc: Mike helps out with the millennium seed bank project at the Chicago Botanic Garden.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: From a Florida prison where a convicted murderer went from hated to hero to the site of a fiery Viking massacre in Ireland, Josh explores six legendary locations where heroes and villains faced their moment of truth.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: From a Spanish Inquisition stronghold of sadism to a haunted theater in Memphis, Tennessee, Josh explores six locations where flesh and blood were shed, but the dead are not forgotten.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Dirt: A New Attitude
programme.desc: Parker lays out his new mine boss philosophy and Mitch and Brennan weigh in. The Ness crew explains how less laughs might equal more gold. Kruse starts a side career as a talk show host. Fred Hurt at 77 explains why he has no intention of slowing down.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters have uncovered a priceless find: a long-lost hoard of Knights Templar relics that could rewrite history. Using cutting-edge methods, they set off on an expedition to reveal the dark secrets behind this mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Curse of the Black Chalice
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters examine their most stunning find: the Black Obsidian Chalice. Together, they investigate the treasure's mysterious origins, decode its strange markings and reveal the secret ceremonies where it may have once been used.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters travel to the Holy Land to investigate if their prized sword once belonged to the Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Cutting-edge archaeology reveals a network of hidden tunnels in Jerusalem with ties to the Bible's greatest relics.

programme.title: Expedition X: Round-Up at Death Ranch
programme.desc: Bizarre cattle mutations in the Pacific Northwest lead Josh Gates to send his team to investigate. The baffling deaths make Jessica and Phil question if the cattle were victims of newly arrived apex predators or the target of something more sinister.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mt. Adams' UFO Encounter
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot follow headlines of hidden hangars and strange orbs of light into an active volcano in Washington.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into one of America's oldest witch stories. In the Tennessee backwoods, locals report being attacked in a vast cave system. Jess and Phil go underground and uncover frightening piles of bones as well as potential human remains.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Promised Land
programme.desc: Parker expands to a second cut and puts his trust in a rookie foreman. Tony battles the cursed cut. Rick fires up his plant on rich ground. Greenhorn Fred Lewis calls in a mining legend. The miners reveal their secrets for striking it rich gold mining.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Is Born
programme.desc: Barbara's back lump became more noticeable after she lost 131 pounds. Bob has two painful bumps on his back. Hilda's depression is a result of the multitude of bumps on her eyelids. Art has one big bump on his head that he covers up with hats.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sisters Lumpity Lump Lump

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit
programme.desc: Brandon has several lumps on his head. Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs. Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off of his arm that looks like it's breaking through the skin.

programme.title: When Skin Goes Wrong: Impusible
programme.desc: Shaneef hopes to be rid of his huge shoulder lipoma. Dr. Adil tackles a large head cyst. A psoriasis sufferer feels like he's exhausted all treatment options. Lyn has kept the same hairstyle for 20 years in order to hide a big lump on her forehead.

programme.desc: A mountain biker has multiple injuries and her boyfriend has multiple fainting spells; a man's legs are severed when he's run over by a train; a drunken bachelor helps reveal the secret of a mystery nurse that has been working in the ER.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Childhood Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a childhood meal with Colin Jost. Plus, Sal fools his mom into thinking she owes 20% of her produce to the government.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Fitness Goals
programme.desc: Our interns examine surveillance videos, including a crocodile that breaks up a swimming pool hook-up and a bruising yacht dive fail.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: Learn how the crew keeps their presence a secret in restaurants and which Joker used to attend team building seminars. Plus, find out what phony fees the Jokers came up with that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: The guys get sassy while posing as auto parts salesmen, then head to the mall where they try to reel in unsuspecting shoppers. Tonight's big loser is stuck in a horrible mess after being locked inside a rigged bathroom of horrors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blind Justice

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tied and Feathered

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Doomed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr take in more than they bargained for while working at a tailor shop, then convince strangers to hand over their cellphones. Plus, tonight's big loser sacrifices his childhood for a punishment three months in the making.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift

programme.title: Las Vegas: Sons and Lovers
programme.desc: Montecito's guest wins, but his wallet is stolen before he can indulge in his winnings.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Strange Life of Bob
programme.desc: Falling in love with a new employee, Nessa presses her new mystery man for more details.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Family Jewels
programme.desc: When five million dollars of diamonds are stolen, Danny and Mike try to catch the thief.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nessa discovers that a distraught blackjack player has a bomb strapped to his chest.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Always Faithful
programme.desc: When counterfeit $100 bills show up at the Montecito, Danny searches for the source.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Pilot
programme.desc: Liz Lemon is living every comedy writer's dream as the head writer of a live TV variety program in New York City. However, her world is turned upside down when a brash, new network executive interferes with her show and the staff.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Aftermath
programme.desc: After Jack Donaghy pushes for creative changes, Liz Lemon must face her writers and keep the show from falling apart. Meanwhile, the writing staff and cast learn how to deal with Tracy Jordan's antics.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Blind Date
programme.desc: Confident he can fix both Liz Lemon's sketch show and sex life, overbearing boss Jack sets Liz up on a blind date with his friend Thomas. With Liz readying herself for her blind date, Jack infiltrates the writers' weekly poker game.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Jack, the Writer
programme.desc: While Kenneth quickly realizes that working for Tracy may be more than he bargained for, Liz struggles to keep Jack out of the writers' room and the scantily clad Cerie in her clothes.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Jack-Tor
programme.desc: After being pressured by Jack to plug GE products into her show, Liz integrates Jack himself into a sketch. While Jack hones his acting chops, Frank and Toofer trick Jenna into fearing for her job, and Liz wonders if Tracy is faking illiteracy.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Jack Meets Dennis
programme.desc: After Liz confesses that she got back with her boyfriend, Jack fears that she is living a life of mediocrity and takes it upon himself to be her mentor. Back at the show, Liz needs to deal with a physically altered cast.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Tracy Does Conan
programme.desc: Jack Donaghy bumps Jenna's scheduled appearance on 'Late Night With Conan O'Brien' by booking new star Tracy Jordan. Liz has her hands full when Tracy's prescription medication triggers erratic behaviour just before his appearance.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Break-Up
programme.desc: Fed up with the boorish antics of her boyfriend, Dennis, Liz sends him packing and attempts to hit the New York singles scene under the guidance of Jenna. Meanwhile, Jack deals with his own relationship woes.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Baby Show
programme.desc: Liz is forced to re-evaluate her personal life after Cerie announces she's engaged to a wealthy man. Meanwhile, Jack must deal with his mother's desire to move in with him.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Rural Juror
programme.desc: Jenna and Liz have a falling out over Jenna's new indie film, 'The Rural Juror.' Meanwhile, Jack encourages a cash-strapped Tracy to use his star power to endorse a product.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Head and the Hair
programme.desc: Liz and Jenna decide to get serious about their dating lives. Meanwhile, Jack and Kenneth the Page switch office roles for 'Bottoms Up' day, with Jack donning the page jacket and Kenneth spending the day as a corporate big wig.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Black Tie
programme.desc: Liz wonders if she is actually on a date with Jack when she accompanies him to a birthday celebration for a foreign prince. Meanwhile, Jenna desperately tries to capture the prince's affection in an attempt to become a princess.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Up All Night
programme.desc: After the entire cast binges on questionable seafood from the craft services table, they hunker down to pull an all-nighter on Valentine's Day. While Pete forgets the holiday all together, romance may be blooming between Kenneth the Page and Cerie.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The 'C' Word
programme.desc: Liz is enraged after Lutz bad-mouths her, then tries to redeem herself to everyone by adopting a more relaxed leadership style. Meanwhile, Jack takes Tracy to a charity golf event, but his plans to use Tracy to get close to the chairman backfire.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Hard Ball
programme.desc: Liz is caught in the middle when Jack sees an opportunity to cut costs starting with Josh, whose contract is up for negotiation. Meanwhile, Jenna gets into trouble when she is misquoted, and Kenneth joins Tracy's entourage.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Source Awards
programme.desc: Jack tries to unload his sub-par wine by making it the sponsor of the Source Awards, which is to be hosted by a fearful Tracy. Meanwhile, Liz goes to great lengths to convince her date that she isn't racist.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Fighting Irish
programme.desc: Jack holds an impromptu family reunion during a taping after learning that his father died. Meanwhile, Liz struggles to decide who she should fire, and then goes power-mad after firing Floyd's girlfriend.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Fireworks
programme.desc: Jack and Kenneth work together when Jack discovers that another NBC executive is after his job. Meanwhile, Pete and Liz adjust to life as roommates, and Tracy learns he's a descendant of Thomas Jefferson.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Corporate Crush
programme.desc: After introducing Floyd to Jack, Liz begins to resent Jack's constant intrusions and his obsession with Floyd. Meanwhile, Tracy tries to get financing for his film on Thomas Jefferson.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Cleveland
programme.desc: Fed up with New York City and frustrated with his career, Floyd contemplates a move to the Midwest and asks Liz if she would consider going with him. Meanwhile, Liz grows suspicious of Jack's new fiancée.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: A New Holiday Spin
programme.desc: The six remaining bakers use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake inspired by a meme and then must 'holiday up' a non-holiday dessert.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Comfort And Joy
programme.desc: The five remaining bakers ignite the holiday spirit with a fiery dessert and turn a traditional cheese board into an unusual cheesecake.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Tradition! Tradition!
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers make Hanukkah jelly doughnuts with challenging flavor combinations and must reinvent fruitcake.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Twelve Days of Christmas
programme.desc: The final three bakers grab last-minute holiday gifts and combine them into an impressive dessert, then must make a dessert inspired by a line from the famous '12 Days of Christmas' song. The winner gets $50,000 and the title of Holiday Baking Champion.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Cracking a Win
programme.desc: French chef David Baruthio and North Carolinian Blake Hartwick arrive at the arena. Anne Burrell and Andrew Zimmerman decide who will face Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Peeling Away
programme.desc: Bobby Flay better bust out his rolling pin! Texas pastry chef Amanda Rockman and blast from Bobby's past Vicki Wells roll into the arena for a chance at sweet victory. "Chopped's" Ted Allen and actress Busy Philipps will see who can rise to the occasion.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Shucking the Competition
programme.desc: French chefs Laurent Zirotti and Eric Damidot go head to head in the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Knighted Sir Loin
programme.desc: Sonoma County chef Tracey Shepos Cenami and Jersey-strong John Vitale fight for the right to battle greatness. If they want to beat Bobby Flay, however, they'll have to impress the sophisticated palates of Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Voltaggio.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Grill Fits the Bill
programme.desc: Food Network's Marc Murphy and Chef Anne Burrell want to rake Bobby Flay over the coals. They'll have help from two grill masters, Chef David Bancroft and BBQ champion Susie Bulloch, as they show no chill trying to grill Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Seeing Stars
programme.desc: Food Network Star alums Alex McCoy and Jay Ducote are in the house to outshine Bobby Flay. Food Network Star winner Damaris Phillips teams up with Chef Richard Blais to ensure that Bobby's star burns out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Inside Scoop
programme.desc: Actress Helene Yorke and Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli conspire to beat Bobby Flay. They bring in southern boy Bobby Hansen and the Midwest's Steven Oakley, two chefs who are vying to take down the east coast king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pulling Out All the Stops
programme.desc: Actor Steve Schirripa and the toughest judge on Food Network, Simon Majumdar, have their sights set on beating Bobby. Boston chef Dave Bazirgan sharpens his knives to take on "Mr. Downtown," Stephen Jones, for the ultimate chance to cook against Bobby.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Collect Them All

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 5
programme.desc: Batman pretends to be sick so he and Commissioner Gordon can go around town watching their favourite shows.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Serious Business/ Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Bucket List
programme.desc: The Titans create a bucket list for Starfire.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 6
programme.desc: Batman is supposed to go to the store with Alfred, but runs off to watch TV with Commissioner Gordon instead.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Kryptonite
programme.desc: Starfire searches for her weakness after Robin explains that knowing your weakness makes you stronger.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Thumb War
programme.desc: A Thumb wrestling war starts in the Titan Tower, and Starfire tries to bring peace.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Thanksgetting
programme.desc: It’s Thanksgiving but the Titans are sick of the normal traditions so they create their own; Trigon makes Raven attend her prom and she brings along the other Titans to upset him.

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Carentan
programme.desc: On D-Day, Plus 3 Easy heads into Carentan, encountering fierce resistance from Germans holed up in buildings.

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Replacements

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Crossroads
programme.desc: Winters leads a contingent on a risky mission over a Dutch dike. Heylinger leads a rescue of British soldiers escaping from the besieged town of Arnhem. News comes of a massive German counterattack in the Ardennes Forest and Easy races to hold the line.

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Bastogne
programme.desc: Easy Company struggles to hold the line alone while fending off frostbite and hunger.

programme.title: Movie: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang

programme.title: Movie: The Black Stallion
programme.desc: A boy's adventure with a magnificent black stallion results in a close friendship.

programme.title: Movie: Rear Window
programme.desc: A photographer who spies on his courtyard neighbours discovers a possible murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Dayna Jennings

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Last Person Inside
programme.desc: When a concerned neighbor stumbles onto a horrifying scene in a Spokane, Washington home, a family is devastated and some buried secrets come to light. Investigators unravel a bizarre web of truths and lies to find enough evidence to catch a killer.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Murder at Fort Hood
programme.desc: In April of 2020, Pfc. Vanessa Guillén goes missing. The Army shuts her loved ones out of the investigation, so her family hires a private search team. When a different soldier is found murdered, it begs the question: What is going on at Fort Hood?

programme.title: Snapped: Traci Wolfe
programme.desc: One man’s brutal murder leads to questions about a doomed love triangle and the intentions of the woman at the center of it all.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Henderson
programme.desc: A shot at love brings an Oklahoma woman to rural Texas, but her quick disappearance has investigators following a paper trail that will expose the treachery of greed.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Fryers
programme.desc: In one of the most tragic and brutal crimes in the history of the Great Plains, five teens playing by a campfire are ambushed when a trio of shotgun-wielding brothers targets them. A lone survivor bravely helps detectives hunt down her assailants.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Suhs
programme.desc: An immigrant family's American dream turns into a nightmare when a devious sister manipulates her younger valedictorian brother into committing murder. When a dark family secret comes to light, it tears the siblings apart.

programme.title: Green River Killer
programme.desc: In one of the largest and longest manhunts in the U.S., authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer. But now it's a cat and mouse game, as they try to get inside his mind, so he'll lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: True Confession?
programme.desc: When college professor Emily Mason is murdered, police quickly arrest her husband Walter, believing he confessed. Faced with evidence suggesting he may be innocent, a small Georgia town confronts the question of whether justice is being served.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Mansion Massacre
programme.desc: When a quadruple homicide is discovered in the ashes of a D.C. mansion fire, a small piece of evidence points to a monster with a grudge, a violent past, and a long rap sheet. A nationwide manhunt ensues to finally bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County: A Deadly Double Life
programme.desc: Keeping up appearances is key in the OC, but when the Stahls are found shot to death on the side of the Ortega Highway, the façade turns deadly. The case leads detectives down a dark path through a series of scandalous and twisted love triangles.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County: A Tale of Two Brothers
programme.desc: The brutal murder of three members of a family in an old monied Fullerton enclave reverberates throughout the neighborhood and the rest of Orange County. The investigation reveals the family's dark secrets and a tragically OC motive.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Murder at Fort Hood
programme.desc: In April of 2020, Pfc. Vanessa Guillén goes missing. The Army shuts her loved ones out of the investigation, so her family hires a private search team. When a different soldier is found murdered, it begs the question: What is going on at Fort Hood?

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Over the Edge

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Thanksgiving Day Charade
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, police officers are sent out on a welfare check and uncover an unthinkable triple homicide. To unmask the killer, detectives must uncover a victim's secrets and examine a hidden world of disinheritance, rage, and dark accusations.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Murder at the House of God
programme.desc: In January 2014, Nathan and Krystal Maddox are gunned down just seconds after leaving a remote Texan church. The brutal double murder leaves a close-knit community traumatized and looking for answers.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Bloodland
programme.desc: Michael and Rebecca Hargon vanish from their Mississippi home along with their young son. When investigators discover Michael has recently come into an inheritance, they are forced to confront the idea that his recent good fortune may be a factor.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: The Night Before Thanksgiving
programme.desc: A single mother falls head over heels for a mysterious and generous man, but when an old flame rekindles, it's a love triangle that will soon turn deadly.

programme.title: The Thanksgiving Axe Murderer
programme.desc: Honour, tradition and love in the Deep South are lost when someone in the family strays from the flock with the help of a suspicious spiritual guide on Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Missing at Thanksgiving
programme.desc: When a man fails to show up to Thanksgiving dinner, the façade of a perfect marriage is shattered, culminating in a devastating discovery on the side of a road.

programme.title: From In-law to Outlaw
programme.desc: When a woman is forced to move in with her adult daughter and son-in-law for health reasons, tensions spiral out of control, and the family's darkest secrets are revealed.

programme.title: The Thanksgiving Axe Murderer
programme.desc: Honour, tradition and love in the Deep South are lost when someone in the family strays from the flock with the help of a suspicious spiritual guide on Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Missing at Thanksgiving
programme.desc: When a man fails to show up to Thanksgiving dinner, the façade of a perfect marriage is shattered, culminating in a devastating discovery on the side of a road.

programme.title: From In-law to Outlaw
programme.desc: When a woman is forced to move in with her adult daughter and son-in-law for health reasons, tensions spiral out of control, and the family's darkest secrets are revealed.

programme.title: The Night Before Thanksgiving
programme.desc: A single mother falls head over heels for a mysterious and generous man, but when an old flame rekindles, it's a love triangle that will soon turn deadly.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Home Alone: Demons of the Past
programme.desc: In desolate, isolated Nebraska in 2014, Valerie and her loving adopted son Nathan are starting a new chapter of their lives when a knock at the door one night brings back demons of the past.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Diabolical: Best of Friends
programme.desc: After sneaking out of his parent's Garden Grove, CA house for a secret late-night party, 19-year-old Jose Najera returns home to find both parents dead on their bedroom floor. Is it a random killing or a robbery gone wrong? The truth is more diabolical.

programme.title: Diabolical: Teach Me to Kill
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, a beloved father of four is found dead in his car. He's been bound, gagged, and asphyxiated. Witnesses lead detectives to a local man named John Brian Ray. But this troubled man is just a pawn in the larger game of a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Pennsylvania native Janet Lynn Mickey's greatest dream is to start her own family. So, when she marries college football-star Darrell Tyburski her future seems secure. But when the young couple has children, they are led down the darkest path.

programme.title: Diabolical: Evil Sister Act
programme.desc: When Samuel Johnson Jr. suddenly vanishes, San Antonio investigators find themselves face-to-face with two sisters who know something. Through a series of interrogations, they reveal an elaborate murder plot meticulously engineered by a puppeteer.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother, The Devil
programme.desc: Wallace Jeffs was raised to believe that his half-brother, Warren, would guide his family to salvation.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to be the Black Market Maestro
programme.desc: A 19-year-old's escalating crimes get him arrested. After a jury acquits him for attempted murder, he reverts back to his old ways by robbing wealthy homeowners. The crime-spree launches a countywide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Home for the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team jump at the opportunity to buy a friend's 100-year-old farmhouse in Manchester, ME, and transform it into their headquarters. They plan to create a showroom, offices and a special space where Ashley can design and create custom pieces.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Saulter
programme.desc: After relocating back to Maine, a family of five has been cramped in their small cabin on a peninsula overlooking Great Pond. Chase and the team want to expand the footprint of their home, but they must work fast to finish the restoration before winter.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Masters to the Rescue
programme.desc: In the lush woods of Manchester, Maine sits 97 acres of pristine land that was recently inherited by Gary and his wife Ellen.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin For the Whole Family
programme.desc: Chase and the team come in to rebuild and ultimately repair this cabin for Laurence and his family.

programme.desc: Brooklyn buddies Anthony and Jack go up against cute and crafty lovebirds Cole and Kelly.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: It's About Flipping Time
programme.desc: Style hunters go up against a competitive husband and wife team.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Bringing the Bling!
programme.desc: Flashy upcyclers Darren and Stephan go to battle with stylish siblings Rose and Sophie. Each pair gets $500 to find, fix-up and flip items purchased at the Brimfield Antique Show in Brimfield, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Heads or Tails?
programme.desc: Fashionable friends with similar tastes, who even share their first name, Laura, go up against fun-loving friends Dianne and Clyde.

programme.desc: Sassy friends, Katie and Jennifer go up against best buds, Scotty and Eddie.

programme.desc: Fashion forward F.I.T. alums, Alicia and Erin are taking on Penn State Upcyclers, Chris and Lindsay.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: City vs. Country
programme.desc: City slickers Jill and James are ready for anything, including taking on sassy country girls, Karla and Michelle.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: It's a Frenemy Face-Off When Two Teams of Friends Flip for the Win
programme.desc: It's a Frenemy Face-off, when professional flippers, Ryan and Nina go head-to-head with their best friends, Jared and Rae.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Eclectic Friends Compete Against Frequent Flippers
programme.desc: Eclectic friends, Doug and June are competing against frequent flippers, Cindy and Lynn.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Good Ol' Reno in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: A couple searches for a beachfront vacation spot in Gulf Shores, AL. They find a house in their dream location but the dated home needs a brand-new look to fit their colorful style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Fix Up
programme.desc: An Ohio couple is ready to trade in cold winters for the sunny skies of St. Petersburg, Florida. They find a fixer-upper with potential to be what they're looking for, but unforeseen structural issues threaten to throw a wrench in their plans.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: St. Joe Beach Overhaul
programme.desc: A couple find a vacation home in St. Joe Beach, but it needs extensive renovations to work for their family. Luckily, they own a construction company, but unforeseen structural issues and budget concerns threaten their plans.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Oxford
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
